mapper.insert: insert into app_cart(user_id, product_id, quantity) values(#{userId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}) on duplicate key update quantity = values(quantity)
mapper.select: select c.cart_id AS cartId, c.quantity, c.updated_at AS updatedAt, p.product_id AS productId, p.barcode, p.name, p.brand, p.image_url AS imageUrl, p.product_status AS productStatus, p.price, p.currency, p.energy_kcal AS energyKcal, p.fat, p.saturated_fat AS saturatedFat, p.carbohydrates, p.sugars, p.fiber, p.proteins, p.salt, p.nutri_score AS nutriScore from app_cart c inner join app_products p on c.product_id = p.product_id where c.user_id=#{userId} order by ${orderBy}

select c.cart_id AS cartId, c.quantity, c.updated_at AS updatedAt, p.product_id AS productId, p.barcode, p.name, p.brand, p.image_url AS imageUrl, p.product_status AS productStatus, p.price, p.currency, p.energy_kcal AS energyKcal, p.fat, p.saturated_fat AS saturatedFat, p.carbohydrates, p.sugars, p.fiber, p.proteins, p.salt, p.nutri_score AS nutriScore from app_cart c inner join app_products p on c.product_id = p.product_id where c.user_id = #{userId} and c.cart_id = #{cartId} limit 1
